ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the type_id in the device_types table */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the device was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the device was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES device_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the device type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the device type was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the device type was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration option */,
  "option_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration option */,
  "option_type" TEXT /* Type of the configuration option (e.g., RW, RO) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration option */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the configuration option was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the configuration option was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration option */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the device_id in the devices table */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the option_id in the configuration_options table */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration option */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the configuration option */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the configuration option was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the configuration option was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_configurations_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES configuration_options ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_configurations_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_configuration_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the config_id in the device_configurations table */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user_id in the users table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_configuration_history_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES device_configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_configuration_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the role_id in the user_roles table */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the user was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the role was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_device_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user_id in the users table */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the device_id in the devices table */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the device was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_device_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_device_access_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the device_id in the devices table */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the device was accessed */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "accessed_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user_id in the users table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_access_logs_accessed_by FOREIGN KEY ("accessed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_access_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_configuration_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the config_id in the device_configurations table */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user_id in the users table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_configuration_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_configuration_versions_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES device_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_documentation" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the device_id in the devices table */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., user manual, datasheet) */,
  "doc_content" TEXT /* Content of the document */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the document was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the document was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_documentation_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_configuration_dependencies" (
  "dep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the config_id in the device_configurations table */,
  "dependent_config_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the dependent config_id in the device_configurations table */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of the dependency (e.g., requires, conflicts) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the dependency was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the dependency was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_configuration_dependencies_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES device_configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_configuration_dependencies_dependent_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_config_id") REFERENCES device_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_permissions" (
  "perm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the role_id in the user_roles table */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission (e.g., read_device, write_device) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("perm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
